name: Rice Griddle Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the rice and drain it thoroughly.
2. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
3. Rub the butter into the sifted flour mixture until well combined.
4. Add the rice to the flour mixture.
5. Beat the egg and add with enough milk to make a soft dough that will drop off a spoon.
6. Drop tablespoonfuls of the mixture onto a hot greased griddle.
